languages.text: "К сожалению, силы противника имеют качественное превосходство — укомплектованы большим количеством узкоспециализированных скитариев. Это позволило им нанести праведным силам — нашей группе — серьезные повреждения и разделить ее. Враг заминировал подступы к центральному устройству и отрезал нас от союзников, что сделало миссию по его ликвидации трудноосуществимой. Единственное, что может изменить ситуацию — вмешательство третьей стороны — Вашей Светлости".

traits.locale_text: "Устало: силы противника имеют качественное превосходство. Это позволило малатекам заминировать подступы к центральному устройству, что делает миссию по их ликвидации трудноосуществимой. Единственное, что может изменить ситуацию — вмешательство Вашей Светлости".

languages.text: "To our grief, the enemy forces have a qualitative superiority — they command large numbers of specialised Skitarii. This has allowed them to inflict major damage upon the righteous forces — our group — and divide it. The enemy has planted mines along the approaches to the central unit and has cut us off from our allies, making the mission to eliminate the threat difficult. The only factor that can alter the situation is intervention from a third party — Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}."
languages.original_text: "К сожалению, силы противника имеют качественное превосходство — укомплектованы большим количеством узкоспециализированных скитариев. languages.text: 「情報：敵軍は質的に優勢である。そのため、敵軍は中央部隊への接近路に地雷を敷設し、任務を困難にしている。状況を変える唯一の要因は、貴{mf|殿|女}の介入である」
languages.original_text: "Information: the enemy forces have a qualitative superiority. This has allowed them to plant mines along the approaches to the central unit, making the mission to eliminate them difficult. The only factor that can alter the situation is Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}'s intervention."

traits.locale_text: 「情報：敵軍は質的に優勢である。そのため、敵軍は中央部隊への接近路に地雷を敷設し、任務を困難にしている。状況を変える唯一の要因は、貴{mf|殿|女}の介入である。」

languages.text: "Ne yazık ki düşman kuvvetleri, niteliksel bir üstünlüğe sahip çok sayıda uzmanlaşmış Skitarius'u komuta ediyor. Bu durum, erdemli kuvvetlere, yani grubumuza büyük hasar vermelerine ve onları bölmelerine olanak tanıdı. Düşman, merkez birime giden yollara mayın döşedi ve bizi müttefiklerimizden kopararak tehdidi ortadan kaldırma görevini zorlaştırdı. Durumu değiştirebilecek tek faktör; üçüncü bir tarafın, {mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri'nin müdahalesi olacaktır."
languages.original_text: "To our grief, the enemy forces have a qualitative superiority — they command large numbers of specialised Skitarii. This has allowed them to inflict major damage upon the righteous forces — our group — and divide it. The enemy has planted mines along the approaches to the central unit and has cut us off from our allies, making the mission to eliminate the threat difficult. The only factor that can alter the situation is intervention from a third party — Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}."

traits.locale_text: "Ne yazık ki düşman kuvvetleri, niteliksel bir üstünlüğe sahip çok sayıda uzmanlaşmış Skitarius'u komuta ediyor. Bu durum, erdemli kuvvetlere, yani grubumuza büyük hasar vermelerine ve onları bölmelerine olanak tanıdı. Düşman, merkez birime giden yollara mayın döşedi ve bizi müttefiklerimizden kopararak tehdidi ortadan kaldırma görevini zorlaştırdı. Durumu değiştirebilecek tek faktör; üçüncü bir tarafın, {mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri'nin müdahalesi olacaktır."

languages.text: «Muy a nuestro pesar, las fuerzas enemigas cuentan con superioridad cualitativa: dirigen gran cantidad de Skitarii especializados. Esto les ha permitido infligir graves daños a las fuerzas de la justicia, nuestro grupo, y dividirlas. El enemigo ha colocado minas en los caminos a la unidad central y nos ha aislado de nuestros aliados, dificultando la tarea de eliminar la amenaza. Solo la intervención de un tercero, como mi{mf|lord|lady}, puede alterar esta situación».
languages.original_text: "To our grief, the enemy forces have a qualitative superiority — they command large numbers of specialised Skitarii. This has allowed them to inflict major damage upon the righteous forces — our group — and divide it. The enemy has planted mines along the approaches to the central unit and has cut us off from our allies, making the mission to eliminate the threat difficult. The only factor that can alter the situation is intervention from a third party — Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}."

traits.locale_text: «Muy a nuestro pesar, las fuerzas enemigas cuentan con superioridad cualitativa: dirigen gran cantidad de Skitarii especializados. Esto les ha permitido infligir graves daños a las fuerzas de la justicia, nuestro grupo, y dividirlas. El enemigo ha colocado minas en los caminos a la unidad central y nos ha aislado de nuestros aliados, dificultando la tarea de eliminar la amenaza. Solo la intervención de un tercero, como mi{mf|lord|lady}, puede alterar esta situación».

languages.text: “令人遗憾的是，敌方在战力素质上占据优势，他们掌握着大量专业化的护教军。这使他们得以对正义之师，即我方队伍，造成重大打击，并将我们分割开来。敌人在通往中央单元的各条通路上布置了地雷，还切断了我方与盟友的联系，使消除威胁的任务难上加难。唯一能改变局势的因素，便是第三方的介入——也就是您，舰长大人。”
languages.original_text: "To our grief, the enemy forces have a qualitative superiority — they command large numbers of specialised Skitarii. This has allowed them to inflict major damage upon the righteous forces — our group — and divide it. The enemy has planted mines along the approaches to the central unit and has cut us off from our allies, making the mission to eliminate the threat difficult. The only factor that can alter the situation is intervention from a third party — Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}."

traits.locale_text: “令人遗憾的是，敌方在战力素质上占据优势，他们掌握着大量专业化的护教军。这使他们得以对正义之师，即我方队伍，造成重大打击，并将我们分割开来。敌人在通往中央单元的各条通路上布置了地雷，还切断了我方与盟友的联系，使消除威胁的任务难上加难。唯一能改变局势的因素，便是第三方的介入——也就是您，舰长大人。”

languages.text: « Hélas, les forces ennemies bénéficient d'une supériorité qualitative : elles ont sous leurs ordres un grand nombre de skitarii spécialisés, ce qui leur a permis d'infliger d'importants dégâts aux forces vertueuses, notre groupe, pour mieux les diviser. L'adversaire a posé des mines aux abords de l'unité centrale et nous a coupés de nos alliés, rendant l'élimination de la menace particulièrement difficile. L'intervention d'une tierce partie... Votre Seigneurie... est le seul facteur susceptible de changer la donne. »
languages.original_text: "To our grief, the enemy forces have a qualitative superiority — they command large numbers of specialised Skitarii. This has allowed them to inflict major damage upon the righteous forces — our group — and divide it. The enemy has planted mines along the approaches to the central unit and has cut us off from our allies, making the mission to eliminate the threat difficult. The only factor that can alter the situation is intervention from a third party — Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}."

traits.locale_text: « Hélas, les forces ennemies bénéficient d'une supériorité qualitative : elles ont sous leurs ordres un grand nombre de skitarii spécialisés, ce qui leur a permis d'infliger d'importants dégâts aux forces vertueuses, notre groupe, pour mieux les diviser. L'adversaire a posé des mines aux abords de l'unité centrale et nous a coupés de nos alliés, rendant l'élimination de la menace particulièrement difficile. L'intervention d'une tierce partie... Votre Seigneurie... est le seul facteur susceptible de changer la donne. »

languages.text: "Leider sind uns die feindlichen Kräfte qualitativ überlegen ... sie befehligen eine große Zahl spezialisierter Skitarii. Deshalb konnten sie den rechtschaffenen Kräften — unserer Gruppe — beträchtlichen Schaden zufügen und sie spalten. Der Feind hat an den Zugängen zur Zentraleinheit Minen deponiert und uns von unseren Verbündeten abgeschnitten, was uns die Eliminierung der Bedrohung erschwert. Der einzige Faktor, der die Situation verändern kann, ist die Intervention einer dritten Partei — Eurer {mf|Lordschaft|Ladyschaft}."
languages.original_text: "To our grief, the enemy forces have a qualitative superiority — they command large numbers of specialised Skitarii. This has allowed them to inflict major damage upon the righteous forces — our group — and divide it. The enemy has planted mines along the approaches to the central unit and has cut us off from our allies, making the mission to eliminate the threat difficult. The only factor that can alter the situation is intervention from a third party — Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}."
